schema.description: Describes the request body of the /indexgroup API call

version.description: Version number for document for optimistic concurrency control. If absent or 0 then no version checks are done.

datasource.description: The datasource for which the group is added

group.description: The group to be added or updated

name.description: name of the group. Should be unique among all groups for the datasource, and cannot have spaces.

group.title: DatasourceGroupDefinition

schema.title: IndexGroupRequest
